ground_truth.title: Insurance for Rideshare and Delivery Drivers | Uber
ground_truth.main_content: Whether you are logged on or have accepted a rideshare or delivery trip, Uber's insurance meets—or exceeds—the required coverage. If you've been in an accident, here's what to do. The page explains different coverage periods: while logged on and waiting for a trip request, from the moment you accept a request until the trip ends, and after the trip ends during the delivery process. Uber provides comprehensive liability coverage, contingent collision and comprehensive coverage, and uninsured/underinsured motorist coverage to help protect drivers.
with: Whether you are logged on or have accepted a rideshare or delivery trip, Uber's insurance meets—or exceeds—the required coverage.
Uber's liability insurance is designed to help protect you in the event of an accident.
The coverage applies from the moment you accept a request until the trip ends.
If you've been in an accident, here's what to do.
Uber provides insurance coverage for both rideshare and delivery drivers.
without: Log in to your Uber account
Sign up to ride, drive, and get delivery

items.caption: Uber insurance for rideshare and delivery drivers
